name: sd-axios-fetch
description: A zero-dependency, drop-in replacement for Axios.js built entirely on the native Fetch API. Full API compatibility with modern web standards.

scripts.version:
node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('CHANGELOG.md', '# Changelog

## [' + require('./package.json').version + '](https://github.com/your-username/sd-axios-fetch/releases/tag/v' + require('./package.json').version + ') - ' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '

- See [release notes](https://github.com/your-username/sd-axios-fetch/releases/tag/v' + require('./package.json').version + ')

' + (require('fs').existsSync('CHANGELOG.md') ? require('fs').readFileSync('CHANGELOG.md', 'utf-8').replace(/^# Changelog

/, '') : ''))" && git add CHANGELOG.md
